snippet.title: Hurricane - LOCO LOCO - Serbia 🇷🇸  - Official Music Video - Eurovision 2021
snippet.description:
Hurricane will represent Serbia at the Eurovision Song Contest 2021 with the song LOCO LOCO.
-
Composer: Nemanja Antonić
Lyrics: Sanja Vučić
Arrangement: Nemanja Antonić, Darko Dimitrov
-
Lyrics:
Nemoj da se ljutiš, hrabrost skupi
Jedna cura kao ja ne traži obećanja
Ne skidaš taj pogled ti sa mene
Lako ušla sam ja u tvoje vene

Osmeh tvoj mi kaže
Da me želiš koga lažeš
Slatka kao ćoko moko
Hajde budi loco

Ram ba-ba-bam
A ja slatka sam i fina
A ti si sam sam sam
I ja znam znam znam
Da biže lom lom lom
Zato hajde budi loco loco

Baby, baby, baby, čemu drama
Jedna cura kao ja ne traži obećanja
Baby, baby, baby, igram sama
To što nisi sa mnom to je tvoja mana

Osmeh tvoj mi kaže
Da me želiš koga lažeš
Slatka kao čoko moko
Hajde budi loco

1, 2... Girls, Come on!
Loco loco
Loco loco
Loco loco

Ne skidaš pogled sa mene
Lako sam ti ušla u vene
Hajde budi loco loco

A ja slatka sam i fina
A ti si sam sam sam
I ja znam znam znam
Da biće lom lom lom
Zato hajde budi loco loco
A ja slatka sam i fina
A ti si sam sam sam
I ja znam znam znam
Da biće lom lom lom
Zato hajde budi loco loco

-

If you want to know more about the Eurovision Song Contest, visit https://eurovision.tv

Shop the official Eurovision Song Contest merchandise: https://shop.eurovision.tv/
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/eurovision 
Follow us on Twitter: https://twitter.com/Eurovision
Follow us on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/EurovisionSongContest/

snippet.title: Evo što Srbi misle o Vučićevoj izjavi da je malvazija odvratno vino
snippet.description: Tijekom gostovanja na sarajevskoj komercijalnoj televiziji Face u intervjuu snimljenom ranije ovaj tjedan Vučić je rekao kako je "vino (malvazija) odvratno i nitko ga ne može piti". U nedjelju ujutro se istarskim vinarima ispričao zbog te izjave, a evo kako tu izjavu komentiraju njegovi sugrađani te što misle o vinu.

snippet.title: Podcast Inkubator #573 - Ratko i Miroslav Škoro
snippet.description:
https://www.facebook.com/XiaomiHrvatska

Polako se zahuktava kampanja za lokalne izbore, a nama na crveni kauč dolazi novopečeni kandidat za gradonačelnika Zagreba - Miroslav Škoro. U kakvim je odnosima bio s pokojnim gradonačelnikom, što ga je uopće nagnalo za ulazak u politiku, kako uskladiti glazbenu s ostalim karijerama? Gledajte nas večeras od 20 sati samo u Podcast Inkubatoru!
---------

snippet.title: Albina - Tick-Tock - Croatia 🇭🇷 - Official Music Video - Eurovision 2021
snippet.description:
Albina will represent Croatia at the Eurovision Song Contest 2021 with the song Tick-Tock.

snippet.title: CBC News: The National | Meghan and Harry’s Oprah interview; Vaccine optimism | March 7, 2021
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan sit down with Oprah for a revealing interview about leaving their roles as senior royals. The reasons to be optimistic about the vaccine rollout and the road ahead. Plus, the officer charged with killing George Floyd goes on trial. 

#HarryandMeghan
#COVID19
#GeorgeFloyd

00:00 The National for March 7, 2021
01:06 Harry and Meghan's Oprah interview
06:32 Multiple donors for same WE Charity project
09:28 Vaccines won’t be end of masks, distancing,
11:36 Canada's COVID-19 vaccine rollout 
12:14 Ontario pharmacies vaccine pilot project 
14:19 Easing COVID-19 restrictions 
14:41 Rally for return of youth sports in Quebec 
16:51 Questions about DHL 'hidden fees'
19:16 Violence continue to escalate in Myanmar
19:40 Pope preaches peace during Iraq visit 
22:55 George Floyd murder trial 
27:46 COVID-19 Pandemic: One Year Later 
28:21 What year two of the pandemic might look like
31:19 Helping seniors access COVID-19 vaccines
34:30 Alberta MLA monitored by police
43:30 Shell Alberta to use robotic dogs 
44:03 The Moment: From Prairies to Bollywood

Subscribe to The National: 
https://www.youtube.com/user/CBCTheNational?sub_confirmation=1

Connect with The National online:
Facebook | https://www.facebook.com/thenational
Twitter | https://twitter.com/CBCTheNational
Instagram | https://www.instagram.com/cbcthenational

More from CBC News | https://www.cbc.ca/news

The National is CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism, with hosts Adrienne Arsenault and Andrew Chang in Toronto, Ian Hanomansing in Vancouver and the CBC's chief political correspondent, Rosemary Barton in Ottawa.

Text pesme:

S' jabukama vruća pita 
Na tvom stolu 
A ja oko bacio na 
Polugolu 

Dodaću joj nešto ljuto 
I cigaru 
Zar postoji vjeran muž 
U noćnom baru 

Koji svirač želi polovnu gitaru 

Ref: 

Šta će s' princezom roker u duši 
Prebrzo živi pije i puši 
Tu niz brdo 
Tu niz brdo sve krene 

Šta će s' princezom roker u duši 
Kad ne bi zbog nje rezao vene 
Šta radiš ti 
Šta radiš ti kraj mene 

Od sramote nek' se ćuti 
Priča naša 
Ja sam samo falš na ruci 
Bogataša 

Dodaću joj nešto ljuto 
I cigaru 
Zar postoji vjeran muž 
U noćnom baru 

Koji svirač želi polovnu gitaru 

Ref: 

Šta će s' princezom roker u duši 
Prebrzo živi pije i puši 
Tu niz brdo 
Tu niz brdo sve krene 

Šta će s' princezom roker u duši 
Kad ne bi zbog nje rezao vene 
Šta radiš ti 
Šta radiš ti kraj mene

trebace mi nocas tvoja mala
ajde sad dovedi je do stana
bice tu kod mene sedam dana
pice samo vino i sampanjac

ajde bani, tu su mi drugari e 
kosu zavi, popi malo, stani e
casu nali, na mene navali e
pa uradi, sto nisi smela ranije

pa uradi sto nisi smela ranije

tvoje oci gledaju me sad, bomba 
kazes kako hoce sa mnom sve, da probas

da se sada skines ne treba, mi lova

mi lova, mi lova

mi lova, mi lova
a cak i da neces doci ce, mi nova

snippet.title: Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, opens up about her family
snippet.description:
For the first time Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, publicly discusses her father Thomas Markle and her half-sister's forthcoming tell-all book in this previously unaired clip from her and Prince Harry's sit-down with Oprah Winfrey. Watch Oprah's full primetime special with Meghan and Prince Harry here: https://bit.ly/3t24kAK

Subscribe to the "CBS This Morning" YouTube channel: https://bit.ly/3ceNNCX
Watch more "CBS This Morning": http://bit.ly/1T88yAR
Like "CBS This Morning" on Facebook: https://on.fb.me/1LhtdvI

Follow "CBS This Morning" on Twitter: https://bit.ly/1Xj5W3p

Get the latest news and best in original reporting from CBS News delivered to your inbox. Sign up for newsletters: https://cbsn.ws/1RqHw7T

Get your news on the go! Download CBS News mobile apps for Android and iOS: https://cbsn.ws/1Xb1WC8

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream local news live, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites and originals anytime, anywhere with Paramount+. Sign up here: https://bit.ly/309gCe2

---
Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Check local listings for "CBS This Morning" broadcast times.

snippet.title: UFC 260: Miocic vs Ngannou 2 – One More Shot | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
The foundations of the Octagon will shake on March 27 when the sport’s premier big men, UFC heavyweight champion Stipe Miocic and number one contender Francis Ngannou meet for the second time in the main event of UFC 260. Widely considered to be the greatest heavyweight in UFC history, Miocic defeated Ngannou in 2018, but in his last four bouts, “The Predator” has scored four consecutive first-round knockouts, proving that he is more than ready to face Cleveland’s finest once again. Plus, fresh from a pair of victories over Max Holloway, UFC featherweight champion Alexander “The Great” Volkanovski defends his crown against Brian “T-City” Ortega.

Subscribe to get all the latest UFC content: http://bit.ly/2uJRzRR

localized.title: UFC 260: Miocic vs Ngannou 2 – One More Shot | Official Trailer
localized.description:
The foundations of the Octagon will shake on March 27 when the sport’s premier big men, UFC heavyweight champion Stipe Miocic and number one contender Francis Ngannou meet for the second time in the main event of UFC 260. Widely considered to be the greatest heavyweight in UFC history, Miocic defeated Ngannou in 2018, but in his last four bouts, “The Predator” has scored four consecutive first-round knockouts, proving that he is more than ready to face Cleveland’s finest once again. Plus, fresh from a pair of victories over Max Holloway, UFC featherweight champion Alexander “The Great” Volkanovski defends his crown against Brian “T-City” Ortega.

Subscribe to get all the latest UFC content: http://bit.ly/2uJRzRR

Experience UFC live with UFC FIGHT PASS, the digital subscription service of the UFC. Visit https://ufcfightpass.com/

snippet.title: Jimmy Kimmel on Meghan & Harry’s Shocking Interview with Oprah
snippet.description:
Oprah made her TV return with Meghan and Harry in a riveting two hour interview about drama with the Royal Family, the reaction from the UK was fierce, the Senate passed President Biden’s $1.9 trillion COVID relief package, the CDC announced that those who have been fully vaccinated can gather indoors with smaller groups, Donald Trump doesn’t want the RNC and Republican committees using his name and likeness to raise money, Pope Francis visited the top Shi’ite Cleric of Iraq to send a message of peace between the Catholic and Muslim worlds, it was fantasy suite night on “The Bachelor” and love was in the air, and Jimmy chats with the editor of the conservative blog “The Daily Rage” who is leading a protest against Space Jam’s new depiction of Lola Bunny.

SUBSCRIBE to get the latest #Kimmel: http://bit.ly/JKLSubscribe

Watch Mean Tweets: http://bit.ly/KimmelMT10

Connect with Jimmy Kimmel Live Online:

Visit the Jimmy Kimmel Live WEBSITE: http://bit.ly/JKLWebsite
Like Jimmy Kimmel on FACEBOOK: http://bit.ly/KimmelFB
Like Jimmy Kimmel Live on FACEBOOK: http://bit.ly/JKLFacebook
Follow @JimmyKimmel on TWITTER: http://bit.ly/KimmelTW
Follow Jimmy Kimmel Live on TWITTER: http://bit.ly/JKLTwitter
Follow Jimmy Kimmel Live on INSTAGRAM: http://bit.ly/JKLInstagram

About Jimmy Kimmel Live:

Jimmy Kimmel serves as host and executive producer of Emmy®-nominated “Jimmy Kimmel Live!,” ABC’s late-night talk show. “Jimmy Kimmel Live!” is well known for its huge viral video successes, with over 11 billion views and more than 15 million subscribers on the show’s YouTube channel. Some of Kimmel’s most popular comedy bits include “Celebrities Read Mean Tweets,” “Lie Witness News,” “Unnecessary Censorship,” “Halloween Candy YouTube Challenge,” and music videos like “I (Wanna) Channing All Over Your Tatum.”

snippet.title: Prince William Responds to Harry and Meghan Interview: "We're Very Much Not a Racist Family"
snippet.description:
Prince William has said his family is not racist and he has not yet spoken to his brother since Harry and Meghan's explosive interview with Oprah Winfrey.

"We are very much not a racist family," he said after a question from a journalist. 

And when asked if he had spoken to his brother yet, the Duke of Cambridge replied: "I haven't spoken to him yet but I plan to."

William spoke during a visit to an east London school with the Duchess of Cambridge on Thursday morning.
tags: we're very much not a racist family

snippet.title: Highlights CA Osasuna vs FC Barcelona (0-2)

snippet.title: Meghan Markle Says Kate Middleton Made Her Cry Before Wedding
snippet.description:
Meghan Markle is setting the record straight. The former “Suits” star spoke with Oprah Winfrey during a bombshell tell-all on CBS, where she addressed a past rumor that she made Kate Middleton cry prior to her wedding to Prince Harry. She said the situation was actually the opposite, and that it was actually Kate who made her cry and that her sister-in-law ended up apologizing.

snippet.title: An Afternoon with Prince Harry & James Corden
snippet.description:
Now that the Duke and Duchess of Sussex are settled into Southern California, James Corden thought it was time to show his friend Prince Harry the sights. From tea on an open top bus to visiting the "Fresh Prince of Bel Air" mansion, Prince Harry gets the tour he never dreamed of. Special thanks to Spartan for providing an incredible Spartan Race Obstacle Course to run. Learn more: spartan.com

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream live TV, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites anytime, anywhere with CBS All Access. Try it free! http://bit.ly/1OQA29B

---
Each week night, THE LATE LATE SHOW with JAMES CORDEN throws the ultimate late night after party with a mix of celebrity guests, edgy musical acts, games and sketches. Corden differentiates his show by offering viewers a peek behind-the-scenes into the green room, bringing all of his guests out at once and lending his musical and acting talents to various sketches. Additionally, bandleader Reggie Watts and the house band provide original, improvised music throughout the show. Since Corden took the reigns as host in March 2015, he has quickly become known for generating buzzworthy viral videos, such as Carpool Karaoke."

snippet.title: The Harry-Meghan-Oprah Interview Is All the Buzz
snippet.description:
James Corden kicks off the show recapping Oprah Winfey's interview with Prince Harry and Meghan, and James realizes the "wedding" he attended wasn't very official at all. And James gives us a handsy tutorial on how to milk a cow. After, Reggie Watts attempts to explain NFT art to James, who cannot pronounce "indistinguishable."

localized.title: The Harry-Meghan-Oprah Interview Is All the Buzz
localized.description:
James Corden kicks off the show recapping Oprah Winfey's interview with Prince Harry and Meghan, and James realizes the "wedding" he attended wasn't very official at all. And James gives us a handsy tutorial on how to milk a cow. After, Reggie Watts attempts to explain NFT art to James, who cannot pronounce "indistinguishable."

snippet.title: What if the World turned to Gold? - The Gold Apocalypse
snippet.description:
The Map of Evolution and other sciency posters, researched and designed with love, are now available on the kurzgesagt shop. 
Your purchase will support us directly and keep our videos free for everyone. 
►► https://shop.kurzgesagt.org
(Worldwide Shipping Available)

Sources & further reading:
https://sites.google.com/view/sources-goldapocalypse/

Let us explore the scientific mystery of what would happen to you, if Earth suddenly turned into gold! The “Midaspocalypse”, based on the ancient tale of King Midas who was cursed so everything he touched turned into gold.

snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
As early as Wednesday, March 3, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 10 (SN10) – our third high-altitude suborbital flight test of a Starship prototype from SpaceX’s site in Cameron County, Texas. Similar to the high-altitude flight tests of Starship SN8 and SN9, SN10 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee – approximately 10 km in altitude. SN10 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship’s attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN10’s Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceX’s third high-altitude flight test of Starship!

TEKST “ HRAM”

Ostavio sam svoje dane u noći, 
Pa na sebe još sam ljut; 
I pogledam u mrak, ko u tvoje oči, 
U taj praznik prekinut.. 
Još me hrani nada da me pamtiš, 
Da sam ti sve, 
Ljubav nije uzmeš pa je vratiš 
Boli me... 

Tvoja ljubav je hram ljubavi 
I kad lomi se nebo ti zlato i srebro si, 
Hram ljubavi, 
Pobeda nam je predaja, zauvek duše su nam ogledala 
Ne veruj ni reč samo srca znaju 
Kad od želje gube dah; 
Ova ljubav je počela na kraju, 
Al imam snage za taj strah..

TEKST “ HRAM”

Ostavio sam svoje dane u noći, 
Pa na sebe još sam ljut; 
I pogledam u mrak, ko u tvoje oči, 
U taj praznik prekinut.. 
Još me hrani nada da me pamtiš, 
Da sam ti sve, 
Ljubav nije uzmeš pa je vratiš 
Boli me... 

Tvoja ljubav je hram ljubavi 
I kad lomi se nebo ti zlato i srebro si, 
Hram ljubavi, 
Pobeda nam je predaja, zauvek duše su nam ogledala 
Ne veruj ni reč samo srca znaju 
Kad od želje gube dah; 
Ova ljubav je počela na kraju, 
Al imam snage za taj strah..

snippet.title: Oprah Winfrey on her bombshell Harry and Meghan interview
snippet.description:
Oprah Winfrey joined "CBS This Morning" the day after her wide-ranging interview with Prince Harry and Meghan, Duchess of Sussex aired on CBS. Winfrey is reacting to some of the most explosive moments of the interview, and what she learned from the couple. Watch Oprah's full primetime special with Meghan and Prince Harry here: https://bit.ly/3t24kAK

Subscribe to the "CBS This Morning" YouTube channel: https://bit.ly/3ceNNCX
Watch more "CBS This Morning": http://bit.ly/1T88yAR
Like "CBS This Morning" on Facebook: https://on.fb.me/1LhtdvI
Follow "CBS This Morning" on Instagram: https://bit.ly/1Q7NGnY
Follow "CBS This Morning" on Twitter: https://bit.ly/1Xj5W3p
Follow CBS News on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3bdNXek

Get the latest news and best in original reporting from CBS News delivered to your inbox. Sign up for newsletters: https://cbsn.ws/1RqHw7T

Get your news on the go! Download CBS News mobile apps for Android and iOS: https://cbsn.ws/1Xb1WC8

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream local news live, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites and originals anytime, anywhere with Paramount+. Sign up here: https://bit.ly/309gCe2

---
Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Check local listings for "CBS This Morning" broadcast times.

snippet.title: Meghan Markle Reveals Kate Middleton Made Her CRY Ahead of Wedding
snippet.description:
Meghan Markle sets the record straight on rumors that she made Kate Middleton cry during Sunday’s ‘Oprah With Meghan and Harry: A CBS Primetime Special.’ The Duchess of Sussex says that it was actually the reverse and that Middleton apologized and sent her flowers. Markle also told Winfrey about why she didn’t feel protected by the royal institution.

snippet.title: I'm back.
snippet.description:
Schlatt moves to Texas. Texas starts snowing. Life is suffering.

Follow me on Twitter:
https://twitter.com/jschlatt

Follow me on Instagram:
https://instagram.com/jschlatt

Schlatt is in Texas and Texas is in Schlatt but I wish it was 10 Big Hot Men in me instead. Hello from the deep south! In this commentary video Schlatt talks about stuff for 8 minutes and change, which is just long enough to pollute the video with multiple midroll ads to make as much money as possible. He talks about the awful Texas Snowstorm 2021, which left millions of people out of power thanks to Ercot - kind of like when Schlatt has a heart attack and perishes on the Dream SMP! I put TommyInnit in the video for half a second just so I can also include him in the description. Maybe I should've titled this Commentary Video "Minecraft's Snowstorm Mod Is Incredibly Funny," and then the thumbnail is Schlatt in a red shirt. Who Is Ranboo? I Still Don't Know. I'm old and grumpy and in Texas with my best friends Mizkif, Trainwrecks, Pokelawls, Esfand, and Marriott International. The power in my house is out but At Least I Have My Blankets. It's almost like I brought the cold weather down south with me. If only I could bring the pizza and bagels with me, too -- maybe have a good old New York Slice of Pizza Pie at my favorite New York City Bodega with New York City Mayoral Candidate Andrew "Chicken Soup" Yang. Better yet, me and Davey Pageviews go out to John's at Bleecker Street, get a 10/10 and then day trade some no-name pink sheet company up 500% by closing. That's what I call a Portnoy Pump! /j /hj /ij /lh

snippet.title: Emanet 133. Bölüm Fragmanı | Legacy Episode 133 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kırımlı is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father’s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew… Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle’s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kırımlı family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kırımlı mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
#Shorts

snippet.title: Najjednostavnija čokoladna torta sa piškotama - bez kuvanja i pečenja
snippet.description:
Čokoladna torta sa piškotama je za sve one koji vole mnogo bogatog krema. Iz naslova vidimo da je sa čokoladom, kao i da je priprema veoma jednostavna, tako da će se sigurno dopasti svima sa nedostatkom vremena. Tortu sa piškotama možete da pravite uz dodavanje nekih svojih omiljenih sastojaka jer je apsolutno podložna promenama. 

Pisani recept možete pronaći na https://domacirecepti.net/cokoladna-torta-sa-piskotama-video/

Domaći recepti je kanal na kojem prikazujemo video recepte za torte, kolače, pogače, kifle. Možete naći predjela kao i glavna jela. Pravimo još i sitne kolače, kolače za slavu, lepinje, posna jela, slavske pogače.

▶ Možete nas podržati i na ovaj način: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCziASxiSNISFR_FxJ8vFjnA/join

𝐒𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐣𝐜𝐢:

1 l slatke pavlake
400 g tamne čokolade
160 g mlečne čokolade
4 pakovanja piškota
120 g šlaga od čokolade

još mleko za umakanje piškota

snippet.title: Дан заљубљених у Дијаниној школи | Кога ће Диана одабрати?
snippet.description:

snippet.title: Film Theory: Why Godzilla WINS! (Godzilla vs Kong 2021 Trailer)
snippet.description:
Subscribe to never miss a Film Theory! ► http://bit.ly/1dI8VBH      

The King of Monsters is back and this time he is not alone! The trailers for Godzilla vs Kong look epic and it meant I had to take a swing at the BIG question - who will WIN? Well Theorists, it's actually pretty simple. So instead of hedging my bets, I'm going to come out and say it. Godzilla will WIN and King King will... well the answer is not that simple. You will just have to watch to find out!

snippet.title: New BMW M4 review: see how quick it is 0-60mph & 1/4-mile!
snippet.description:
Head to http://bit.ly/-Spring-Event to check out a load of all-new & exclusive carwow Spring Deals! Be quick though - they’re only there until March 31st! 
.............................................................

Introducing the all-new BMW M4! 

That’s right, Mat’s finally got his hands on the new M4 Competition! We know certain elements (👀) of the M4’s design may not be to everyone’s taste, but does the new M4 offer enough changes elsewhere to help you overlook them?

Well with it being a BMW M, we need to start with performance… And we can assure you that the new M3 & M4 do NOT disappoint! With a 3-litre straight-six turbo, they can put down a whopping 510hp and 650Nm, while it can easily shoot you to 60mph in under 4 seconds!

But of course, we know you’re probably still not happy with that new grille. But let’s be honest, given it was announced so long ago, aren’t we all kind of used to it now? Or are you still so disappointed you can’t bear to look yet? 

So what do you think? The performance is exactly the same as the new BMW M3 Competition, but would you choose the coupe M4 over the saloon M3? Let us know in the comments!

snippet.title: This week on RELEASED | ROSÉ (Official Trailer)
snippet.description: Join ROSÉ this week on RELEASED as she tests how well her friends know her, see what artists are on her playlist, and performs solos with various instruments. All this leading up to the world premiere of her new music video “On The Ground”! Can't miss Music moments. RELEASED, every Thursday, only on YouTube. #RELEASEDonYT #ROSÉ  #OnTheGround

pt-BR.description: Junte-se a ROSÉ esta semana no RELEASED, quando ela testa o quanto seus amigos a conhecem, revela quais artistas estão em sua playlist e toca solos com vários instrumentos. Tudo isto antes da estreia mundial de seu novo clipe, “On The Ground”! Momentos musicais imperdíveis. RELEASED, toda quinta, só no YouTube. #RELEASEDonYT #ROSÉ  #OnTheGround

es-419.title: Esta semana en RELEASED | ROSÉ (Tráiler Oficial)
es-419.description: Únete a ROSÉ este semana en RELEASED, donde pondrá a prueba cuán bien la conocen sus amigos, descubre cuáles artistas están en su lista de reproducción, y mírala hacer solos con varios instrumentos. ¡Todo esto en anticipación al estreno mundial de su nuevo video musical “On The Ground”! Momentos imperdibles de la música. RELEASED, cada jueves, solo en YouTube. #RELEASEDonYT #ROSÉ  #OnTheGround

ko.title: RELEASED 이번 주 이야기 | ROSÉ (공식 예고편)
ko.description: 이번 주 RELEASED에서는 ROSÉ가 친구들이 ROSÉ를 얼마나 잘 아는지, 플레이리스트에 어떤 아티스트가 있는지를 테스트하고 다양한 악기로 솔로 공연을 합니다. 그리고 곧 공개될 그녀의 새 뮤직비디오 "On The Ground" 세계 첫 공개까지! 음악의 순간을 놓치지 마세요. 매주 목요일 오직 YouTube에서 RELEASED를 만나보세요. #RELEASEDonYT #ROSÉ  #OnTheGround

vi.title: Tuần này trên RELEASED | ROSÉ (Trailer Chính thức)
vi.description: Trong tập RELEASED của tuần này, hãy cùng ROSÉ xem thử bạn bè cô ấy hiểu cô ấy tới đâu, những nghệ sĩ nào có mặt trong danh sách phát của cô ấy, và xem cô ấy biểu diễn độc tấu nhiều nhạc cụ. Tất cả là để chuẩn bị cho việc ra mắt video âm nhạc mới của cô ấy, "On The Ground", trên toàn cầu! Đừng bỏ lỡ khoảnh khắc âm nhạc. RELEASED, thứ Năm hàng tuần, chỉ có trên YouTube. #RELEASEDonYT #ROSÉ  #OnTheGround

en.title: This week on RELEASED | ROSÉ (Official Trailer)
en.description: Join ROSÉ this week on RELEASED as she tests how well her friends know her, see what artists are on her playlist, and performs solos with various instruments. All this leading up to the world premiere of her new music video “On The Ground”! Can't miss Music moments. RELEASED, every Thursday, only on YouTube. #RELEASEDonYT #ROSÉ  #OnTheGround

th.title: สัปดาห์นี้ใน RELEASED | ROSÉ (ตัวอย่างทางการ)
th.description: พบกับ ROSÉ ในรายการ RELEASED สัปดาห์นี้เมื่อ ROSÉ ทดสอบว่าเพื่อนๆ รู้จักเธอดีแค่ไหน ศิลปินคนไหนที่เธอชอบฟัง และการแสดงเดี่ยวกับเครื่องดนตรีหลากหลาย ทั้งหมดนี้ก่อนรับชมการเปิดตัวมิวสิกวิดีโอเพลงใหม่ครั้งแรกในโลก เพลง “On The Ground” ของ ROSÉ ห้ามพลาดช่วง Music ใน RELEASED ทุกวันพฤหัสบดี เฉพาะทาง YouTube #RELEASEDonYT #ROSÉ  #OnTheGround

id.title: Pekan ini di RELEASED | ROSÉ (Trailer Resmi)
id.description: Bergabung dengan ROSÉ  pekan ini di RELEASED selagi dia menguji seberapa baik teman-temannya mengenalnya, melihat siapa artis yang ada di daftar putarnya, dan tampil solo dengan berbagai instrumen. Semua ini mengarah ke premier dunia video musik barunya “On The Ground”! Momen Musik yang tak bisa dilewatkan. RELEASED, tiap Kamis, hanya di YouTube. #RELEASEDonYT #ROSÉ #OnTheGround

ja.title: 今週の「RELEASED」| ROSÉ ロゼ（公式トレーラー）
ja.description: 今週の「RELEASED」ではROSÉが登場し、友人がどれだけ自分を理解しているかテストをしたり、彼女のプレイリストの中身や様々な楽器を使ったソロ演奏などを披露します。さらには、新曲“On The Ground”のミュージックビデオを初公開！お見逃しなく。「RELEASED」は毎週木曜日、YouTubeで独占配信。#RELEASEDonYT #ROSÉ  #OnTheGround

snippet.title: Full Replay: Starship SN10 Flight Test, Landing, and Post-Flight BOOM!
snippet.description:
SpaceX is set to launch the Starship SN10 prototype to an altitude of approximately 10 kilometers. A launch attempt is possible between 9 am and 6 pm Central time on Wednesday. However, as with testing, there is always a chance that teams could decide to stand down and try again on a different day.

snippet.title: Dvanaest godina nije obukao čarape
snippet.description:
Žarko Hrgić i Zenice neobičan je po svemu. Dvanaest godina živi u špilji uz Babinu rijeku  bez struje i vode. Nikada vatru nije naložio, nikada se nije razbolio a jedan od njegovih recepata je život bez čarapa na nogama. Umjesto čarapa Žarko noge oblaže prvo papirom od vreća za brašno a zatim sve to obloži najlonom. Nakon toga obuva obuća na noge. Bez obzira na vanjsku temperaturu Žare ne nosi čarape. Pogledajte video koji smo snimili kod kontejnera za otpad koje Žarko svakodnevno posjećuje.
Pridružite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIu6gtFVDK1u93irvvVrD2A/join

snippet.title: KONAČNI OBRAČUN SA REPTILIMA: Mi smo deo velikog sukoba, štiti nas moćna galaktička federacija!
snippet.description:
Gost na YouTube kanalu "Nauka i Misterije Balkan" bio je Aleksandar Hengl, osnivač društva prijatelja "Povratak Izvoru". On je medijum, astralni putnik i komunikacioni kanal za vanzemaljske civilizacije galaktičke federacije, u misiji za podizanje svesti usnulog čovečanstva i njegovu integraciju u galaktičke tokove i Univerzumske Unifikacije. Kao osnivač duhovnog centra “Povratak Izvoru” u Novom Sadu, organizuje edukativne skupove "Susret nauke i duhovnosti". Takođe je i saradnik serijala emisija “Kosmos”. Preporučujemo Vam da pogledate celu emisiju i saznate više o brojnim zanimljivim temama.

Emisiju je vodio novinar Aleksandar Pavković.

*************************************************************

Zabranjeno je svako preuzimanje snimaka i objavljivanje na drugim YouTube kanalima. Svi duplikati će biti uklanjani u skladu sa YouTube pravilima. Iz ovoga će biti izuzeti samo oni koji dobiju specijalnu dozvolu od vlasnika autorskih prava.

Autorska prava: "BALKAN INFO - Zvanični kanal"
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCLG5Qu54Q7gywaCeDs5etuQ

*************************************************************

Svi koji verno prate emisije i žele da pomognu rad naše produkcije to mogu učiniti iz Srbije i iz inostranstva. Trudićemo se da ostanemo dosledni našoj ideji o slobodnom novinarstvu i širenju istine bez cenzure.

https://www.patreon.com/tvbalkaninfo/

Rad naše produkcije možete podržati kupovinom majica, dukserica, šolja i drugih proizvoda koji uz moderan i elegantan dizajn promovišu vrednosti za koje se svi zajedno borimo.

https://www.balkaninfo.rs/prodavnica/

TEESPRING - Online prodavnica (samo za inostranstvo)

*************************************************************

BALKAN INFO je nezavisna medijska produkcija osnovana u junu 2015. godine u Beogradu. Prepoznati smo kao glas svih koji ne žele da budu deo kratkotrajnih projekata i saveza, svih onih koji poštuju srpske tradicionalne vrednosti i koji čuvaju sećanje na naše slavne pretke.

snippet.title: What's new on Ferrari's 'radically changed' 2021 F1 car
snippet.description:
Ferrari has revealed the car tasked with helping it bounce back from its humiliating 2020 season - the SF21. As well as some noticeable tweaks to the livery there was also plenty of technical detail on show, giving us lots to sink our teeth into as we look for the key clues of how Ferrari is going to turn its fortunes around in 2021.

snippet.title: OSIJEK vs GORICA 1:1 (24.kolo, HT Prva liga 20/21)
snippet.description:
U vrlo važnom dvoboju 24. kola HT Prve lige za vrh ljestvice Osijek i Gorica su osvojili po bod odigravši 1:1. Iznimno uzbudljivo pogotovo je bilo u sudačkoj nadoknadi susreta.

Dvoboj je počeo šansom Miereza, no vrlo brzo je Gorica pokazala da može igrati ravnopravno kod Osijeka. Vremenom, gosti iz Velike Gorice ostavljali su i dojam organiziranije i konkretnije momčadi.

Igralo se vrlo čvrsto, a nakon nekoliko solidnih šansi s obje strane u 55. minuti je postignut prvi pogodak. Matar Dieye je iz drugog pokušaja, nakon uvodne dobre reakcije osječkog vratara Ivušića, zabio za 1:0 gostiju.

Osijek je bio osuđen loviti zaostatak, ali do sudačke nadoknade imao je samo jednu dobru šansu (Mierez). No, u nadoknadi je krenula ludnica.

Prvo je Bohar realizirao jedanaesterac u 91. minuti, dok je Ante Erceg u 95. iz blizine zabio za 2:1. Ipak, VAR provjera je pokazala da je igrač Osijeka tom prilikom bio u minimalnom zaleđu.

Osijek je time napravio korak unatrag u borbi za sam vrh ljestvice, a Gorica je ostala na pet bodova iza Osijeka.

Kao i sve ranije utakmice ovog kola, tako je i u Osijeku susret započeo minutom šutnje u znak preminulog velikana hrvatskog nogometa Zlatka Kranjčara.

HT Prva liga, 24. kolo: Osijek - Gorica 1:1 (Bohar 90.+1-11m / Dieye 55.)

snippet.title: Emanet 131. Bölüm Fragmanı | Legacy Episode 131 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kırımlı is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father’s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew… Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle’s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kırımlı family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kırımlı mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
#Shorts

Bas: Martin Petračić 
Bubanj: Janko Novoselić 
Back vokali: Matija Cvek 
Mix: Alan Dović 
Master: Dragutin Smokrović
 
Hvala svima koji su doprinijeli na setu i u stvaranju ove priče.
 
Booking i management: Mia Milovčić 
Kontakt: mia.milovcic@gmail.com 
Mob. 091/3434361

*Tekst*
 
Istina kao ružan san dolazi kad sklopim oci,
na prstima i kupa sjene u samoći.
Razgovaram, tim sjenama se tiho klanjam, 
uz novi krug pitanja. 
 
Pjevaju li ptice kad ti zatreba stih ?
Vjeruj mi da mogu ja bih umjesto njih.
Čuvaju li kazaljke nas jutarnji mir ?
Odgovora nema gorko mirim se s tim...mirim se s tim. 
 
Ako stvorim je tu, sve drugo bit će mi lako.
Ako stvorim je tu, kraj sebe bar na kratko.
Dozivam ju, da u sjećanju ostane...ostane tu. 
 
Spavaj, sanjaj
ja čuvat ću stražu,
a ako suze te pronađu 
javi 
 
Pjevaju li ptice kad ti zatreba stih ?
Vjeruj mi da mogu ja bih umjesto njih.
Čuvaju li kazaljke nas jutarnji mir ?
Odgovora nema gorko mirim se s tim...mirim se s tim. 
 
Ako stvorim je tu, sve drugo bit će mi lako.
Ako stvorim je tu, kraj sebe bar na kratko.
Dozivam ju, da u sjećanju ostane...ostane tu.

snippet.title: Why Some Supercars Take More Than Money To Buy
snippet.description:
Thank you to Raycon for sponsoring today’s video! To get premium audio in your life, go to https://buyraycon.com/donut for 15% off your order!

Supercars are some of the most exclusive cars in the world, with pricetags often in the hundred of thousands if not millions of dollars. But in this scene, just because you have the money to pay for it, doesn't mean you can buy it. Find out which brands are the "easiest" to buy, does Ferrari have a secret buyers list, and how to buy a hypercar before its even announced!

Special thanks to Misha Mansoor, you can check out Horizon Devices here https://horizondevices.com/ and GetGood Drums here https://www.getgooddrums.com/

snippet.title: DINAMO vs RIJEKA 2:0 (24.kolo, HT Prva liga 20/21)
snippet.description:
Derbi utakmica 24. kola HT Prve lige na maksimirskom stadionu završila je pobjedom Dinama protiv Rijeke od 2:0.

Dinamo je opet samostalno na vrhu ljestvice. Ima dva boda više od Osijeka, ali i jedan susret manje odigran.

Odlično je Dinamo otvorio utakmicu. Odlučno je krenuo po rani pogodak i on se dogodio u 27. minuti. Lijepu akciju odmjerenim je udarcem zaključio Ivanušec za 1:0.

Nakon toga je uslijedilo odlično razdoblje igre u kojem su obje momčadi vrlo opasno prijetile, a najbolju priliku je imao Menalo za Rijeku, no njegov je udarac zaustavio domaći okvir vrata.

U nastavku je Dinamo tražio drugi pogodak i potvrdu pobjede koja se dogodila u 67. minuti. Strijelac je bio Oršić čime je Dinamo "zabetonirao" novu pobjedu, osmu u nizu (u svim natjecanjima). U posljednje četiri utakmice Dinamo nije primio ni pogodak.

Kao i sve ranije utakmice ovog kola, tako je i u Zagrebu susret započeo minutom šutnje u znak preminulog velikana Dinama i hrvatskog nogometa Zlatka Kranjčara.

HT Prva liga, 24. kolo: Dinamo - Rijeka 2:0 (Ivanušec 27., Oršić 67.)

snippet.title: Perseverance Rover’s Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: Niko Kranjčar u suzama: ‘Cicek moj, you did it your way. Volimo te!’
snippet.description:
U suzama, u majici 'ponosan sam kaj sam Purger', Niko Kranjčar se popeo na pozornicu, pogledao prema gore i po posljednji put se oprostio od Cice Kranjčara. Od svog Ciceka, svog idola, uzora. Svog tate.

snippet.title: Miley Cyrus - Angels Like You (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Miley’s New Album Plastic Hearts is Available Now: https://mileyl.ink/PlasticHearts
 
View merch at Miley’s official store now! https://smarturl.it/MileyStore?iQid=yt  

Follow Miley on Spotify, Apple Music or Deezer to get new music as soon as it’s out: https://smarturl.it/FollowMC?iQid=yt 

Connect with Miley
Facebook: https://mileyl.ink/facebook 
Twitter: https://mileyl.ink/twitter 
Instagram: https://mileyl.ink/instagram 
Snapchat: https://mileyl.ink/snapchat 
Tiktok: https://mileyl.ink/tiktok 
Site: http://www.mileycyrus.com

LYRICS
Flowers in hand, waiting for me 
Every word in poetry 
Won’t call me by name, only baby 
The more that you give the less that I 
Need everyone says I look happy 
When it feels right

I know that you’re wrong for me
Gonna wish we never met on the day I leave
I brought you down to your knees 
‘Cause they say that misery loves company 
It's not your fault I ruin everything
And it’s not you’re fault I can’t be what you need
Baby 
Angels like you can’t fly down here with me 
I’m everything they said I would be

(La La la)
I’m everything they said I would be

I’ll put you down slow
Love you goodbye 
before you let go, just one more time
Take off you’re clothes
pretend that it’s fine
A little more hurt won’t kill you 
tonight mama says you don’t look happy 
Close your eyes 

I know that you’re wrong for me
Gonna wish we never met on the day I leave
I brought you down to your knees 
‘Cause they say that misery loves company 
It's not your fault I ruin everything
And it’s not you’re fault I can’t be what you need
Baby 
Angels like you can’t fly down here with me 
I’m everything they said I would be

I know that you’re wrong for me
Gonna wish we never met on the day I leave
I brought you down to your knees 
‘Cause they say that misery loves company 
It's not your fault I ruin everything
And it’s not you’re fault I can’t be what you need
Baby 
Angels like you can’t fly down here with me 
I’m everything they said I would be

CREDITS:
Directed By Alana O’Herlihy & Miley Cyrus
DOP: Kevin Hayden
Editor: Alana O’Herlihy
Graphics and Logos by: Emmanuel O’Brien & Eamonn Freel
On-set Production: Eva Evans; Camera Operator: Yuya Kudo;
Post Production: Louise Mérat at Streeters

snippet.title: Unemployment: Last Week Tonight with John Oliver (HBO)
snippet.description:
John Oliver details the many obstacles that impede access to unemployment benefits – often by design – and why the entire system needs to be rethought.

snippet.title: Podcast Inkubator #572 - Rođendanski podcast S Raletom, Ivonom i Markom
snippet.description:
Tlo se nakon razornog potresa u središnjoj Hrvatskoj zatreslo više od 1000 puta. Svako novo podrhtavanje tla donosi novi nemir, a sličan efekt u ovim napetim vremenima može izazvati i vibracija mobitela. Zato ugasi vibru i preuzmi Smirilicu, umirujuću melodiju zvona nastalu smirivanjem vibracija samog potresa. Smiri sebe i okolinu, preuzmi Smirilicu i doniraj za potresom pogođena područja, a više saznaj ovdje: https://www.cinipravustvar.hr/smirilica
---------
DANAS Podcast Inkubator slavi svoj 4 rođendan! U tom smo razdoblju kao pioniri podcast forme na ovim prostorima na YouTube bespuća izbacili debelo preko 600 emisija u kojima je gostovalo oko 400 različitih gostiju. Do sada je na našoj platformi djelovalo čak 7 autora i zato ćemo iskoristiti ovu priliku zahvaliti se Dei Redžić, Aidi Šukurici i Fil Tilenu na tragu koji su ostavili u našem podcastu! Najveća hvala ipak ide našoj vjernoj publici koja je od početka prepoznala naš sadržaj i koja nas i danas podržava i gura prema naprijed. I nama zvuči nestvarno brojka od 150 milijuna pregleda koliko gotovo ima kanal ili čak milijun jedinstvenih gledatelja koji su gledali naše emisije samo u prošlom mjesecu!
---------
POTRAŽITE NAS na sljedećim kanalima:

FACEBOOK: https://www.facebook.com/podcastinkub...​
INSTAGRAM: https://www.instagram.com/podcast.ink...​
WEB: https://podcastinkubator.com/​
E-MAIL: podcast.inkubator@gmail.com

snippet.title: Sen Çal Kapımı 35. Bölüm 1. Fragmanı
snippet.description:
Sen Çal Kapımı 35. Bölüm 1. Fragmanı

Hayatta bütün umutlarını eğitimine bağlayan Eda, yurtdışı eğitim bursunu keserek lise mezunu kalmasına neden olan Serkan Bolat’la karşı karşıya gelir. Serkan Bolat, kendisiyle iki ay nişanlı taklidi yaparsa Eda’ya bursunu geri vermeyi teklif eder. Eda nefret ettiği bu adamın teklifini önce reddetse de koşullar değişince kabul etmek zorunda kalır. Nişanlı taklidi yaparken, Serkan ve Eda , bütün doğru bildiklerini unutturacak, tutkulu, zorlu bir ilişki yaşamaya başlarlar. Çünkü aşk zordur. Ve bu yüzden muhteşemdir.

Oyuncular:
HANDE ERÇEL
KEREM BÜRSİN
NESLİHAN YELDAN
EVRİM DOĞAN
ANIL İLTER
MELİSA DÖNGEL
ÇAĞRI ÇITANAK
ELÇİN AFACAN
SİTARE AKBAŞ
BAŞAK GÜMÜLCİNELİOĞLU
ALİCAN AYTEKİN

İLKYAZ ARSLAN

It's Monday 8 March 2021. Our top stories this morning 0:00

The Duke and Duchess of Sussex's much-anticipated interview with Oprah Winfrey has aired in the US - with the couple sharing their side of the story about life in the Royal Family.

The couple spoke about their relationships with other royals, racism and how their mental health suffered.

Meghan spoke with Oprah for most of the interview, before being joined by Prince Harry.

Get the full story 👉 http://bbc.in/3rqBdH3

After the teasing clips, the full interview between the Duke and Duchess of Sussex and Oprah Winfrey was shown last night in the US. Oprah with Meghan and Harry: A Primetime Special, is produced by Harpo Productions

Follow the story 👉 https://bbc.in/3bnQe6D

snippet.title: Obraćanje predsednika Srbije Aleksandra Vučića posle sednice Saveta za nacionalnu bezbednost (18+)
snippet.description:
Najbrže rastući portal u Srbiji https://www.alo.rs/​ 

Sednica Saveta za nacionalnu bezbednost na kojoj će se raspravljati o detaljima u vezi sa akcijom borbe protiv organizovanog kriminala u Srbiji održala se u 18 časova u Palati Srbija.

Kako je Vučić najavio ranije danas, na sednici se razmatraju veoma ozbiljna pitanja, situacija oko korona virusa, nove prilike na Kosovu i Metohiji, u regionu, u svetu i Evropi, novoj administraciji u SAD, a pre svega o borbi protiv organizovanog kriminala.

#NajnovijeVestiSrbija​ #AleksandarVučić​ #SavetZaNacionalnuBezbednost​

FACEBOOK: https://www.facebook.com/ALOjavlja​

INSTAGRAM: https://www.instagram.com/alo_novine/​

TWITTER: https://twitter.com/ALOnovine

snippet.title: Fullscreen: Nevjerovatno putovanje
snippet.description:
April 1993. Sarajevo je bilo pod dramatičnom opsadom još od proljeća 1992. godine. Usred uništavanja zemlja je postepeno pokušavala uspostaviti institucije.

Među njima je i Košarkaški savez BiH. Jedan od ciljeva bio im je putem sporta smjestiti Bosnu i Hercegovinu na kartu svijeta.

Misiju je vodio Mirza Delibašić, legenda jugoslavenske košarke, bivši igrač Real Madrida, olimpijski, svjetski i evropski prvak.

#TheLongShot #NevjerovatnoPutovanje #MirzaDelibasic

Pratite nas: http://www.youtube.com/ajbalkans
http://facebook.com/ajbalkans
http://instagram.com/ajbalkans/
http://twitter.com/ajbalkans
http://balkans.aljazeera.net

snippet.title: See Mars Like Never Before! NASA's Perseverance Rover Sends New Video and Images of the Red Planet
snippet.description: NASA’s Perseverance Mars Rover safely touched down on the Red Planet on Feb. 18. So what will the robotic scientist "see" on her descent and what will she do next? Join mission experts for update about the rover – the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space – including imagery it captured and its mission to explore Mars.

snippet.title: DAVID RADOSAVLJEVIC x DRIA - DIOR (Official Video)
snippet.description:
DAVID RADOSAVLJEVIC x DRIA - DIOR
David i Dria Booking & info: +38163606609 Sasa Matejic

Muzika: Neven IN VIVO
Tekst: Neven IN VIVO
Aranzman: Patriarch
Mix i Master: TOZLA

Video by Visual Fever
https://www.instagram.com/visual.fever.studio

Specijalno hvala event centru Club City Hall na nesebicnoj pomoci pri realizaciji spota
https://www.instagram.com/clubcityhall

https://www.instagram.com/radosavljevicdavid

Dria instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/_dria.1_

Patriarch instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/patriarch_x6x

Tozla instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/tozla

Neven IN VIVO instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/neven_invivo

Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Volim kako zvuci uzdah mog imena, s tvojih toplih usana,
Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Kad mi tiho kazes sta da ti radim ja,
Benzin preko plamena.

Sa tobom sve je rulet, od milke do nule,
Brze nego Tesla S, ej
Tako ti je sa princezama, voli kad je vezana,
Pssst, Samo niko da ne cuje.

Ele ele ele ele
Ko bi reko da je mala ziva vatra.
Ele ele
Njene misli koje skriva nocu gresnije od pakla.

Subota uvece, susi, Buddha bar,
Leti ide se na Rodos,
Zivi zivot mala kao da je superstar,
Mamin i tatin je ponos.

Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Volim kako zvuci uzdah mog imena, s tvojih toplih usana,
Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Kad mi tiho kazes sta da ti radim ja,
Benzin preko plamena.

Mala moze casove da daje,
Kada igra opasna je,
I svi kazu aj jaj jaj jaj,

Nocas lepa je ko Raj,
Kukovima uvija,
I svi kazu samo aj jaj jaj

Leti ide se na Rodos,
Zivi zivot mala kao da je superstar,
Mamin i tatin je ponos.

Yaman Kırımlı is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father’s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew… Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle’s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kırımlı family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kırımlı mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
#shorts
